name: lux-dev
description: Visual output surface for Claude Code: display text, images, tables, plots, and interactive elements

args: if command -v mcp-proxy >/dev/null 2>&1 && [ -f "${HOME}/.punt-labs/mcp-proxy/lux.toml" ] && grep -q '^\[lux\]' "${HOME}/.punt-labs/mcp-proxy/lux.toml"; then exec mcp-proxy --config lux; else exec lux serve; fi
